title: Core switch fabric degradation causing packet loss on VLAN 200
description: Nexus 9000 core switch pair experiencing 3-5% packet loss on VLAN 200 (production application tier). Affecting 45 application servers. Root cause traced to outdated NX-OS firmware with known bug CSCvz12345.
resolution: Traffic rerouted via backup path. Permanent fix requires NX-OS upgrade.

title: BGP session flapping with ISP causing intermittent internet outages
description: Primary BGP peering session with AT&T dropping every 15-20 minutes. 200+ users experiencing 30-60 second internet outages during failover. MTU mismatch suspected.
resolution: Reduced MTU to 1400. ISP confirmed MTU issue on their PE router.

title: Wireless controller failover failure leaving Building B without WiFi
description: Primary WLC crashed due to memory exhaustion. Secondary WLC failed to assume control of 120 APs due to stale HA configuration. 350 users without WiFi for 2 hours.
resolution: Manual failover performed. HA configuration resynchronized. Firmware upgrade needed.

title: Firewall rule misconfiguration blocking SAP traffic after change window
description: After scheduled firewall policy update, implicit deny rule blocked SAP RFC traffic on ports 3300-3399. Finance team unable to process month-end close for 4 hours.
resolution: Emergency change to add SAP RFC allow rule. Change process needs improvement.

title: DNS resolution failures during datacenter UPS maintenance
description: Both internal DNS servers lost power simultaneously during UPS battery replacement. 500+ clients unable to resolve internal hostnames for 8 minutes.
resolution: DNS restored. Need DNS-03 in DC-2 for geographic redundancy.

title: VPN concentrator reaching 95% session capacity during remote work surge
description: GlobalProtect VPN hit 950 of 1000 session limit during snowstorm WFH event. New connections refused. Backup VPN not configured for load sharing.
resolution: Increased session limit to 1200. Need active-active VPN configuration.

title: MPLS circuit between HQ and DR site showing elevated latency
description: MPLS circuit showing 45ms latency (normally 12ms) and 0.1% packet loss. Database replication falling behind. ISP reports fiber degradation.
resolution: Traffic shifted to backup VPN tunnel. ISP dispatched fiber repair crew.

title: Network monitoring blind spot - 30 switches missing from SNMP polling
description: Quarterly audit revealed 30 access-layer switches not monitored. Two had failing PSUs that went undetected for months.
resolution: All switches added to monitoring. Need automated discovery process.
